title: Neobotrydium ambrosioides
intro: Neobotrydium ambrosioides, a plant native to Southeast Asia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Bioactive constituents of Neobotrydium ambrosioides include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenes, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. In traditional medicine, Neobotrydium ambrosioides is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into medicinal oils and salves.
